title: Space optimized cabin arrangement for a vehicle as well as a passenger cabin having a plurality of seats and such a cabin arrangement
abstract: A cabin arrangement (2) for a vehicle, comprises a first lateral segment module (4) having a first main extension axis (14), a second lateral segment module (6) having a second main extension axis (16) and an aisle (20), wherein the first main extension axis (14) and the second main extension axis (16) run parallel to each other, wherein the first lateral segment module (4) and the second lateral segment module (6) are distanced from each other in a direction perpendicular to the main extension axes (14, 16) and enclose the aisle (20) between each other, which aisle (20) runs parallel to the main extension axes (14, 16), and wherein the first lateral segment module (4) comprises a receiving space (26) for receiving serving trolleys (28), wherein the receiving space (26) comprises a receiving opening, which faces into the aisle (20). The receiving space (26) is designed for receiving serving trolleys (28), which are arranged transverse to the first main extension axis (14) and staggered parallel to the first main extension axis (14).
claims:
Claims C L A I M S 1. Cabin arrangement (2, 64, 70, 74) for a vehicle, comprising: a first lateral segment module (4) having a first main extension axis (14), - a second lateral segment module (6) having a second main extension axis (16) and an aisle (20), wherein the first main extension axis (14) and the second main extension axis (16) run parallel to each other, wherein the first lateral segment module (4) and the second lateral segment module (6) are distanced from each other in a direction perpendicular to the main extension axes (14, 16) and enclose the aisle (20) between each other, which aisle (20) runs parallel to the main extension axes (14, 16), wherein the first lateral segment module (4) comprises at least one receiving space (26) for receiving serving trolleys (28), wherein the at least one receiving space (26) comprises a receiving opening, which faces into the aisle (20) and wherein the at least one receiving space (26) is designed for receiving serving trolleys (28), which are arranged transverse to the first main extension axis (14) and staggered parallel to the first main extension axis (14). 2. Cabin arrangement (2, 64, 70, 74) according to claim 1, further comprising a first vehicle attendant seat (8, 66) arranged between the main extension axes (14, 16) of the lateral segment modules (4, 6) and at a distance to the lateral segment modules (4, 6) along the main extension axes (14, 16). 3. Cabin arrangement (2, 64, 70, 74) according to claim 1, further comprising a first vehicle attendant seat (71, 75), which is arranged on one of the lateral segment modules (4, 6) or a component inbetween on a surface, which is orientable transverse to the respective main extension axis (14, 16). 4. Cabin arrangement (2, 64, 70, 74) according to claim 2 or 3, wherein the first vehicle attendant seat (8, 66, 71, 75) is laterally movable and arrestable in at least two laterally distanced positions. 5. Cabin arrangement (2) according to any of the preceding claimsa, further comprising a second vehicle attendant seat (10), which is arranged at first back wall (11) positioned at an end (13) of one of the first lateral segment module (4) and the second lateral segment module (6) facing away from the first vehicle attendant seat (8). 6. Cabin arrangement (2, 64, 70, 74) according to claim 5, wherein the first vehicle attendant seat (8) and the second vehicle attendant seat (10) create a tandem arrangement. 7. Cabin arrangement (2, 64, 70, 74) according to claim 5, wherein the first back wall (11) spans up a plane, which extends perpendicular to the first main extension axis (14) or the second main extension axis (16). 8. Cabin arrangement (2, 64, 70, 74) according to any of the preceding claims, wherein at least one of the first lateral segment module (4) and the second lateral segment module (6) comprises a lavatory (7), which is accessible through a lavatory opening facing into the aisle (20). 9. Cabin arrangement (2, 64, 70, 74) according to any of the preceding claims, wherein at least one of the lateral segment modules (4, 6) comprises at least one first compartment (40) having an access opening extending perpendicular to the main extension axes (14, 16). Cabin arrangement (2, 64, 70, 74) according to any of the preceding claims, 

 further comprising a closable passage opening (17) at an end of the aisle (20). 11. Cabin arrangement (2, 64, 70, 74) according to any of the preceding claims, wherein each of the lateral segment modules (4, 6) comprise a front, which directly connect to a door region (32) of the vehicle. 12. Cabin arrangement (2, 64, 70, 74) according to any of the preceding claims, wherein at least one lateral segment module (4, 6) comprises a holding device positioned exterior to the receiving space (26) for temporary holding a serving trolley (28). 13. Passenger cabin, comprising a plurality of seats and at least one cabin arrangement (2, 64, 70, 74) according to any of the claims 1 to 12. 14. Vehicle, comprising a passenger cabin comprising a plurality of seats and a cabin arrangement (2, 64, 70, 74) according to any of the claims 1 to 12. 15. Vehicle according to claim 14, wherein the vehicle is an aircraft and the cabin arrangement (2, 64, 70, 74) is arranged at a front end of the passenger cabin and wherein the aisle (20) connects to a cockpit access.
